svg.text: System prompt + bound tools + the Cypher each tool runs against the Lab 3 typed graph.
Rules: call resolve_professor_tool first. If exactly one match, call get_professor_facts_tool before answering.
Handoff: if the user asks for topic-based recommendations, call transfer_to_research_match.
Style: ground every answer in tool output; never answer from prior knowledge.
Each tool call also emits a teaching event:
Goal: turn a fuzzy name into a ranked
Goal: fetch grounded facts for one professor —
Not a Neo4j call — pure routing.
UNION ALL UNWIND p.emails / p.phones / p.websites RETURN ...
Example turn — "What are CHENG Cheng's research interests?"
